positive: A stylized, neo-geometric mandala composition featuring blooming celestial flowers and intricate bioluminescent flora. The central motif is a stylized crescent moon cradling abstract constellations and trailing vines. Design must utilize deep indigo blues, vibrant teal, emerald green, and pops of neon gold against a near-black void background. Emphasis on clean silhouettes, strong contrast, radial symmetry, and crystalline detail. The art style should blend Art Nouveau organic fluidity with sharp, clean vector graphics, ensuring the design reads well as a high-contrast textile print. Full composition, overhead view, epic scale, glowing volumetric lighting, symmetrical, highly detailed, flat graphic design.
